shortDescription: ADR-191: Parking Type Unification + Open Space Support
problem: 4 divergent ParkingSpot interfaces across the codebase (types/parking.ts, useFirestoreParkingSpots, API route, DXF Viewer). Hardcoded Greek labels in UI. buildingId was required, preventing open-space parking.
cause: Organic growth without canonical type definition. Each layer defined its own ParkingSpot with different fields (code vs number, level vs floor, different type/status enums).
solution: Phase 1: Canonical type in src/types/parking.ts with buildingId optional, projectId support, new locationZone field. API updated for open-space. Phase 2: UI components updated to i18n + Radix Select + locationZone. Phase 3: Legacy files migrated to canonical types. Phase 4: DXF Viewer local ParkingSpot replaced with canonical import.
testing: npx tsc --noEmit — 0 new errors in parking files. Vercel build triggered.
notes: Compatible with LOCKED architecture decisions. No new hierarchy levels added. parking_spots collection unchanged. Backward compatible — existing documents work with optional buildingId.

commits.message: feat(parking): ADR-191 — canonical ParkingSpot type unification + open space support
